title: Wow!Heroes!
description: Customizable Superpowers? Stats? People running around with sticks?!?!
body:
Wow!Heroes! is a data pack for 1.20.1 inspired by series' such as My Hero Academia and Invincible. 
The pack itself allows you to customize your ability (Or superpower) with a variety of options including custom body effects, changing the particle effects of your mutation and much more. 

The level up system works by taking 2 actual levels and investing them into any on of your stats you pick. 

Be sure to also enable the resource pack provided with the data pack.

!!! Currently the pack includes W.I.P. spawning mobs called the Criminal and the Nomu. 
Both are optional to kill however you're able to inherit the abilities of a Nomu through using a Nomu serum (See the recipe in images). 

!!!! This pack is still a heavy W.I.P. I just wanted to upload what I have so far to gauge interest since I haven't seen anything like this done before.
